sourceNote: 請以品牌官方技術手冊、產品 leaflet、教育手冊或官方色卡為準。若資料來自經銷商、部落格或非官方影片，verified 必須為 false 或 partial。
notes: Majirel permanent color seed rules. Grey coverage proportions must be confirmed with current regional training material.

conditions: Permanent color, same level, darkening or lift within Majirel guidance.
warnings: Use current Majicreme developer guidance for the region.
Avoid overlapping porous lengths unless refreshing is intentional.

conditions: Grey coverage with natural/basic shade support when needed.
warnings: Coverage of resistant white hair requires saturation and current brand instructions.

conditions: Corrective work after professional strand test.
warnings: Corrector grams are not calculated without explicit brand shade guidance.

restrictions: Assess damaged or porous hair before use.
Avoid on high damage or scalp-sensitive situations.

greyCoverageRules.note: Low white hair percentage may use target shade if coverage is adequate.
Up to 50% white hair often uses target shade; verify current guide.
For higher white hair percentage, natural/basic shade support may be needed.
High white hair percentage: half natural/basic support is a common Majirel guide pattern.

restrictions: Do not use metallic tools when product instructions prohibit them.
warnings: Use only as a formulation aid; final shade number and reflect choice require stylist confirmation.

notes: High-lift seed rules for natural bases where the product line is indicated.

conditions: High-lift blonding and toning in one step where Majirel High-Lift is appropriate.
warnings: Not a substitute for bleach on darker or color-treated bases.

restrictions: Use only where high-lift color is appropriate.
High risk near scalp and on damaged or previously colored hair.
Not recommended over artificial dark color or black dye residue.
warnings: Professional assessment is required before high-lift services.
